title: Fortnite Symbols: Copy & Paste ツ 亗 Sweaty Name Characters
meta_description: Sweaty Fortnite symbols — ツ 亗 乂 smiles, power kanji, clan-tag stars, and crosshair glyphs, plus ready-made sweaty name combos. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The ツ smiles, 亗 marks, power kanji, and crosshair glyphs behind every sweaty Fortnite name. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Sweaty Fortnite symbols are the shorthand of the competitive lobby: a ツ after your name, a 亗 or 乂 framing your clan tag, a single kanji that makes a four-letter name look like a pro's. Epic's display-name rules allow most of these Unicode characters, so they survive in your locker, on kill feeds, and in Arena leaderboards. Copy individual characters below, or grab a ready-made sweaty name combo and swap in your own name.

sections.label: Sweaty Classics
sections.intro: The katakana and CJK marks that defined the sweaty name era — ツ above all.

sections.label: Power Kanji
sections.intro: Single kanji with heavyweight meanings — one character that carries a whole vibe.

sections.label: Clan Stars
sections.intro: Stars and bolt glyphs that make two-letter clan tags pop in the kill feed.

symbols.label: Greek Small Letter Koppa (Lightning Bolt Style)

sections.label: Tag Brackets
sections.intro: Corner and lenticular brackets that frame clan tags more cleanly than plain [ ].

sections.label: Combat
sections.intro: Crosshairs, crossed swords, and skulls for box-fighter and aim-demon energy.

collection_section.label: Name Combos
collection_section.intro: Copy a full sweaty name layout in one click, then replace the placeholder with your own name in the Epic display-name settings.

cta: Use UltraTextGen to convert plain text into bold, italic, cursive, and 100+ other Unicode font styles — free and instant.
